name: Ecosystem Setup
description: Guided setup for a new Shopify ecosystem project. Determines stack pattern, establishes project conventions, configures reference material, and produces a project context document.

name: Ecosystem Reference
description: Comprehensive Shopify partner ecosystem reference covering all 16 platforms

name: Integration Patterns
description: Integration architecture patterns. Hub-and-spoke, middleware, event-driven. Complexity matrix, common gotchas, error handling.

name: PIM Strategy
description: PIM selection and strategy. Akeneo vs Bluestone vs Inriver. Complexity scoring, sync patterns, variant mapping.

name: Marketing Stack
description: Marketing technology selection. Email, SMS, reviews, loyalty, personalisation. Decision trees and integration patterns.

name: Data Flows
description: Data flow patterns. Product sync, customer events, order lifecycle, search, reviews. Event mapping and timing.

name: Cost Analysis
description: Cost estimation and optimisation. Stack pattern costs, platform pricing, integration costs, TCO framework.

name: Ecosystem Assessment
description: Assess current or desired Shopify ecosystem. Business profiling, anti-pattern detection, pattern matching, gap analysis.

name: PIM Selection
description: Guide PIM platform selection. Complexity scoring, Akeneo vs Bluestone vs Inriver evaluation, integration assessment.

name: Platform Audit
description: Audit existing Shopify ecosystem for anti-patterns, integration health, cost optimisation opportunities.

name: Stack Architecture
description: Design technical architecture. Integration pattern selection, data ownership, data flow mapping, ADRs.

name: Integration Plan
description: Create phased integration plan. Platform dependencies, implementation sequencing, go/no-go checkpoints.

name: Cost Model
description: Build detailed cost model. Platform costs, integration costs, ongoing operations, total cost of ownership.

name: Integration Build
description: Build and configure platform integrations. App install, API setup, webhook config, data mapping, testing.

name: Data Flow Design
description: Design detailed data flows. Source analysis, field mapping, transformation rules, error handling patterns.

name: Integration Validate
description: Validate integrations. Data accuracy, sync timing, error handling, reliability testing.

name: Go Live
description: Go/no-go assessment. Phase checklists, cutover sequence, rollback strategy, launch plan.
